vocab.meaning: tuổi thơ bình dị và hạnh phúc
vocab.example: I had an idyllic childhood growing up in the countryside, where going for walks was our primary source of entertainment.
I often reminisce about the long evening strolls I took with my parents along the riverbank.

vocab.meaning: quyền tiếp cận tự do, không bị giới hạn
vocab.example: Back then, we had unfettered access to the local woodlands, allowing us to wander for hours on end.

vocab.meaning: một cảm giác kinh ngạc và thích thú
vocab.example: Every walk felt like an adventure, filling me with a sense of wonderment at the natural world.
In my hometown, it was perfectly safe for children to roam freely and explore the paddy fields.
My early years were steeped in nature, as walking outside was an integral part of our daily routine.

vocab.meaning: sự tò mò không bao giờ thỏa mãn
vocab.example: Driven by insatiable curiosity, I would spend my afternoons walking to see where the local stream led.

vocab.meaning: không gian rộng lớn ngoài trời
vocab.example: My parents always encouraged me to spend time in the great outdoors instead of staying cooped up inside.

vocab.meaning: trò giải trí/thói quen yêu thích
vocab.example: Walking to the local pagoda with my grandmother was a cherished pastime that I still hold dear.

vocab.meaning: những cuộc phiêu lưu kỳ thú, đầy ngẫu hứng
vocab.example: I remember going on whimsical adventures through the narrow alleys of my village every summer.
